_meta.note: Parameterised JSON-LD templates. Variables in {{handlebars}} are runtime-injected. Drop into <Script type="application/ld+json"> server-side in Next.js.

_constants.paymentAccepted: Cash, Credit Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna

shared.organization.name: Whalesborough Farm Resort & Spa
shared.organization.description: A five-star gold working Cornish farm, spa, restaurant and 30+ self-catering cottages and Arvor Suites on a 450-acre coastal estate above Widemouth Bay.

shared.website_with_searchaction.name: Whalesborough Farm Resort & Spa
shared.website_with_searchaction.description: Five-star gold Cornish farm resort, spa and restaurant on a 450-acre coastal estate above Widemouth Bay.

homepage.resort.name: Whalesborough Farm Resort & Spa
homepage.resort.description: Five hundred acres of Cornish coast above Widemouth Bay. Twenty-seven cottages, twenty-two Arvor Suites, a spa, a farm-to-fork restaurant and a working farm. Five-star gold, dog-friendly, and run on our own wind turbine.
homepage.resort.paymentAccepted: Cash, Credit Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna

starRating.description: Five Star Gold Award — VisitEngland Quality Scheme

stay.cottages_collection.name: Cottages & Lodges at Whalesborough
stay.cottages_collection.description: Twenty-seven self-catering cottages and lodges across 450 acres of working Cornish farm — sleeps two to ten, hot tubs, woodburners, dog-friendly throughout.

spa.health_business.name: The W Club Spa
spa.health_business.description: The W Club — a botanical day spa on a 450-acre working Cornish farm. Gaia Natural Skincare rituals, indoor 29°C pool, sauna, steam room, gym. Adults only, no under-13s.

areaServed.name: The W Club, Whalesborough Farm Resort & Spa

dine.restaurant.name: The Weir Restaurant
dine.restaurant.description: Lakeside farm-to-fork restaurant at Whalesborough Farm. Breakfast, lunch and supper club menus built from the estate's market garden, neighbouring farms and Cornish boats. Dog-friendly.
dine.restaurant.paymentAccepted: Cash, Credit Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay

additionalProperty.name: Use class
additionalProperty.value: Holiday use only — not a primary residence

own.rental_calculator_app.name: Whalesborough Owner Rental Income Calculator
own.rental_calculator_app.description: Illustrative tool showing potential historic gross rental income across the Whalesborough managed letting programme. Past performance is not a guide to future performance. Capital at risk. This is not a regulated investment.

own.howto_process.name: How to buy a residence at Whalesborough
own.howto_process.description: The five-step ownership pathway, from first viewing through reservation, legals and completion.

step.name: Private viewing
step.text: Book a private estate viewing with the sales team.

step.name: Plot selection
step.text: Choose your range, plot and specification.

step.name: Reservation
step.text: Reserve your plot with a refundable holding deposit.

step.name: Legals & licence
step.text: Your solicitor reviews the 125-year licence, site rules and onward costs.

step.name: Completion & handover
step.text: Funds drawn, keys released, owner-services onboarding completed.

estate.tourist_destination.name: Whalesborough Estate — 450 acres above Widemouth Bay
estate.tourist_destination.description: A 450-acre working Cornish farm and rewilded estate at Marhamchurch — woodland, lakes, alpaca pastures, kitchen garden and a 60kW wind turbine, eight minutes from Widemouth Bay.

journal.blog_hub.name: The Whalesborough Journal
journal.blog_hub.description: Stories from a working Cornish farm — seasons, suppliers, the kitchen garden, the coast path, dog-friendly trails, the rituals of a slow weekend.

_route_index_pointer: See seo-meta.md for the per-route mapping of which template applies to which page.
